content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "GCD Length". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1511/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. Each test case contains an integer n, the length of the array. Then an array of n integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the length of the longest subarray with a GCD of the subarray greater than 1.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use the Euclidean algorithm to calculate the GCD of subarrays and keep track of the longest subarray with a GCD greater than 1.
